parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "AddressPanel : JPanel" as AddressPanel
participant ContactsController
participant "addressFrame: JFrame" as addressFrame
participant Persistence
participant RepositoryFactory
participant ContactsRepository
participant BufferedReader
participant FileReader

note over AddressPanel
  double clicks on
  the contact to open a window
end note

AddressPanel -> addressFrame : new (contact)
addressFrame -> ContactsController : tmp = validatePostalCode(postalCode)
ContactsController -> BufferedReader : create()
BufferedReader -> FileReader : create(file_name)

loop while there are lines to read
  ContactsController -> BufferedReader : readLine()
end

alt tmp == true
  addressFrame -> ContactsController : updateAddress(contact, main_address, secondary_address)
  ContactsController -> Persistence : getRepositoryFactory()
  Persistence -> RepositoryFactory : newInstance()
  ContactsController -> RepositoryFactory : getContactsRepository()
  ContactsController -> ContactsRepository : update(contact)
end
@enduml
```
